scripts.seed:local: npx tsx scripts/seed-demo.ts > /tmp/ia-seed.sql && wrangler d1 execute inbox-angel --local  --file=/tmp/ia-seed.sql; rm -f /tmp/ia-seed.sql
scripts.seed:remote: npx tsx scripts/seed-demo.ts > /tmp/ia-seed.sql && wrangler d1 execute inbox-angel --remote --file=/tmp/ia-seed.sql; rm -f /tmp/ia-seed.sql

CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN.description: Runtime API token for Email Routing + DNS writes. Not the deploy token — create a separate one. See the README (Before you start) for step-by-step instructions and required permissions.

CLOUDFLARE_ZONE_ID.description: Your Cloudflare Zone ID. Find it at dash.cloudflare.com → click your domain → right sidebar → Zone ID.
